rulings.Case Title: 11TH & KISSLING STREET TRUST VS. CLARA TRIAIRE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ; Request For Judicial Notice; Declaration Of Clara Triaire; Separate Statement Of Undisputed Material Facts; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities N Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 16, 2015, line 11. DEFENDANT CLARA TRIAIRE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR. Possession is no longer at issue in this action. Per Notice filed by Plaintiff Defendant agreed to surrender possession prior to filing of this motion and was to vacate on October 15, 2015. This action is no longer subject to unlawful detainer procedures. Moving party is to comply with CCP 437c. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY P FENG VS. NACERA SIAMER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 16, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANTS' NACERA SIAMER, YAHYA BENKHELOUF, AMINA BENKHELOUF, WALID BENKHELOUF, MOHAMED BENKHELOUF, DINA BENKHELOUF, NAIT FAZIA DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges Plaintiff's standing to seek possession under SFRO 37.9(a)(8). Moving party fails to cite any authority on point for the proposition that the potential failure to comply with the provisions on the contract between Ms. Feng and Housing Authority may deprive Plaintiff of his right to seek possession pursuant to SFRO 37.9(a)(8). Finally, defendant fails to cite authority for the proposition that all co-owners of the property have to be named as Plaintiffs in an unlawful detainer action under SFRO 37.9(a)(8). = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: COLLIN LAM VS. NICOLE DELISI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants Nicole Delisi And Leon Pitre To Continue The Trial Date From October 19, 2015 To November 2, 2015
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 16, 2015, line 5. Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants Nicole Delisi And Leon Pitre To Continue The Trial Date From October 19, 2015 To November 2, 2015 DENIED. Moving party failed to follow the requirements of CCP 1170.5, which provides in relevant part "No other extension of the time for trial of an action under this chapter may be granted unless the court, upon its own motion or on motion of any party, holds a hearing and renders a decision thereon as specified in subdivision (c)." Additionally, moving party did not seek to keep discovery open or to re-open discovery (See Notice of Motion). Finally, there are two attorneys listed as counsel for Defendants. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA A ZARUR VS. TAFFI VASQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of The Summons And Complaint (Delta Motion)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 16, 2015, line 9. DEFENDANT TAFFI VASQUEZ, JIMMY ZARUR Notice Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of The Summons And Complaint (Delta Motion) DENIED. The Court has jurisdiction as complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and an oral rental agreement. Reference to written rental agreement at most makes the complaint uncertain, but under Delta uncertainty is not grounds for the motion to quash. Delta Imports v. Mun. Court (1983) 146 Cal.App.3d 1033. = (501/AJR)
